summary: First iteration: comprehensive backend (23 pytest tests, all PASS) and frontend E2E testing for Orbit Infra Projects. All critical flows verified: health, auth, properties CRUD, public leads, admin leads/notifications, stats, testimonials, file upload+serve. Frontend: home/nav/lang toggle/WhatsApp button work; loan form submits; contact form submits; properties filter works; admin login + property creation + visible on public site + leads view + status update all working end-to-end.

minor.issue: Returns 401 on home/public pages for anonymous users — expected; frontend tries to detect admin session on every public page producing console 401s. Consider gating the auth-me call to admin routes only to reduce noise.

issues: api.get('/auth/me') is fired from public pages causing harmless 401s in console; recommend only calling on /admin routes.

action_items: (Optional) Limit /api/auth/me call to /admin/* routes to silence 401 console noise on public pages.
(Optional) Add data-testid on Loan page form fields (currently filled by name/placeholder) for stable E2E test selectors.
(Optional) Loan EMI slider is a range input; programmatic dispatchEvent didn't update React state in test — works fine for real users.
critical_code_review_comments: Storage init uses module-level global `storage_key` with synchronous `requests` calls inside async FastAPI endpoints (/api/upload, /api/files); for low-load OK, but should be moved to httpx/async or threadpool for scalability.
Admin user check inside get_current_admin queries DB on every request — fine for low traffic; cache or use JWT claims for role to reduce DB hits.
CORS allow_origins defaults to '*' with allow_credentials=True which most browsers reject; works in current setup because cookie is set with secure=False and same-site=lax. Acceptable for MVP.
seed_data_creation: Created 1 test property 'TEST_UI Villa' via admin UI (still in DB) and lead 'TEST_Visitor' (Contacted) + 'TEST_name' (loan, New) leads — main agent can delete via admin UI if needed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers full CRUD + auth + leads + stats + upload. Frontend uses data-testid attributes (admin-login-email/password/submit, prop-name/location/price/area, save-property-btn, contact-name/mobile/email-input/message/submit-btn, filter-* and status-select-{i}, emi-amount/rate/tenure/result, loan-submit-btn). Test artifacts: TEST_UI Villa property and 2 leads exist in DB.
rca of the issue: N/A — no functional bugs found in this iteration.
